source.title: How Do I Withdraw My Ships from Faction Fleet?
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “How Do I Withdraw My Ships from Faction Fleet?.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
If you’ve enlisted ships in Faction Fleet (SCORE) and want to withdraw them, here’s how it works:
What You’ll Need
SOL in your wallet to cover transaction fees
Toolkits to repair your ships (required for withdrawal)
Withdrawing automatically repairs your fleet using Toolkits from your wallet.
Steps to Withdraw Your Fleet
Go to play.staratlas.com/fleet
Click Manage Fleet
Click Manage Ship
Click Withdraw Entire Fleet
⚠️ You cannot withdraw ships individually. You must withdraw the entire fleet assigned to that faction.
